Start a build
Architecture

Topology over theater.

I use diagrams to explain where authority lives, how state moves, and what the system has to keep in sync. I do not use them to leak implementation details that should stay private.

What these diagrams show

Systems, handoff points, and the direction of trust.

What they do not show

Trading logic, thresholds, or any implementation detail that would expose sensitive behavior.

SuperFIB

Hub-and-spoke control across trading surfaces

The backend API is the authority. The indicator, execution layer, and dashboard are coordinated around it so parity can be checked and stale state can be caught early.

The point of the shape is control. One authoritative state reduces ambiguity when multiple runtimes need to agree.

Stokvel Society

A clear finance flow for contributions and payouts

This system is intentionally simpler in shape. The important thing is that money movement stays understandable and every step can be explained to a member or administrator.

The diagram focuses on readability because the product itself depends on trust and clarity more than visual complexity.

SS Developers

I build trading, fintech, and data-heavy systems for teams that need the software to stay correct when the environment gets messy.

© 2026 SS Developers. Built in Cape Town.
